technical_improvement.baseline_problem: Neural networks can fail under distributional shift and produce over-confident classifications in safety-critical vehicle systems.
technical_improvement.mechanism: Use neural-network feature vectors, cluster filtering, Euclidean-distance thresholding, a second supervised filter, and vehicle-control deployment.
technical_improvement.technical_effect: Reject or classify sensor images more safely before vehicle steering, braking, or acceleration actions.

eligibility_flags.recommended_next_step: Keep the review anchored in the concrete vehicle-control loop and source-backed ML pipeline rather than merely limiting generic image classification to vehicles.

support_flags.recommended_next_step: Practitioner should review threshold and model-boundary language, including Euclidean-distance and softmax-threshold support.

notes: The public excerpts include concrete AI/ML pipeline details and vehicle-control deployment support.
Threshold and model-boundary language still merits practitioner review.
